violations.text: Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license expired, FMC must re-instate (food safety certificates are current). Application provided during time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2024

The door and screen door to the outside, located in the rear, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. Baking racks 2. Condensers and interior and exterior of refrigeration units New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

The floors in the walk-in cooler and under kitchen equipment have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. FMC expired must re-instate once food safety certificates are obtained. Application provided during time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2024

Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Bottles were labelled during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

The screen door to the outside, located in the rear, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. Baking racks 2. Condensers at refrigeration units 3. Fanguards in walk-in cooler New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
